title: Better Group and Status Automations

posts.author: Bobby.Trick (Bobby Trick)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am currently making a series of automations that will move items to groups when the phase is changes to the corresponding status, and that change the status when items are moved between groups.

I ultimately only have 7 groups which will create 14 automations, but it would be wonderful if these could be built into one handy tool. or for each group/ status to function bi-directionally.

Hopefully I’m just missing some easy way to do this. If so, I’m interested in other’s solutions to this problem.

posts.author: greentoothbrush (ian ross)
posts.cookedHtml: I don’t think there is a nice solution. It is not possible to write generic automations, so each status/group change needs its own automation.
